channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kyle Rittenhouse Faces Backlash from MAGA Supporters After Endorsing Thomas Massie
item.description: Kyle Rittenhouse, the figure who gained national attention after being acquitted in the 2020 Kenosha shootings, is experiencing significant backlash from parts of the MAGA movement following his publi...

item.title: Pianist Jayson Gillham's discrimination case against Melbourne Symphony Orchestra begins in federal court
item.description: The federal court trial of pianist Jayson Gillham against the Melbourne Symphony Orchestra (MSO) has commenced in Melbourne. Gillham alleges the orchestra unlawfully discriminated against him by cance...

item.title: Hamilton Police Request Witnesses After Stoney Creek Shooting Incident
item.description: Hamilton police are actively seeking witnesses and information regarding a recent shooting in the Stoney Creek area. The incident occurred in the evening, and authorities are urging anyone who may hav...

item.title: Betway Premiership relegation fight to be decided on final match day
item.description: With just one fixture remaining in the Betway Premiership season, the relegation struggle has come down to a tense final day for Magesi, Orbit, and Marumo Gallants. Magesi sit at the bottom of the tab...

item.title: Ali Isa JC Emerges Winner in APC Primary for Balanga/Billiri Constituency
item.description: Hon. Ali Isa JC, wey dey represent Balanga/Billiri Federal Constituency for Gombe State, don secure APC ticket for 2027 general elections after him win the party primary on Saturday. Him victory follo...

item.title: Rise in Adult Whooping Cough Cases Linked to Childhood Infection
item.description: A persistent cough, often dismissed as a minor ailment, is increasingly being linked to whooping cough, or pertussis, a bacterial infection historically associated with children. Recent studies reveal...

item.title: Negi Gives a Surprise Kiss to Long During Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal Episode
item.description: During a recent episode of the popular ABS-CBN game show 'Kapamilya Deal Or No Deal,' comedian and TV personality Negi delighted audiences with an unexpected moment. In the show, Negi surprised fellow...

item.title: Four US Navy crew safely eject after mid-air collision during Idaho air show
item.description: On Sunday, during the Gunfighter Skies Air Show near Mountain Home Air Force Base in Idaho, two US Navy E/A-18G Growler jets collided in mid-air about two miles from the base. Thankfully, all four cre...

item.title: Two fatalities reported after 5.2-magnitude earthquake in Guangxi, China
item.description: On Monday morning, a 5.2-magnitude earthquake struck the southwest region of Guangxi in China, resulting in the deaths of two people and prompting the evacuation of thousands of residents. The tremor ...

item.title: Tanzania and Russia Strengthen Cooperation Across 12 Key Sectors
item.description: Dar es Salaam — Tanzania and Russia have formalised cooperation agreements covering twelve main sectors, including language, health, agriculture, energy, tourism, education, science, technology, trans...

item.title: President Nixon Flies Commercial Airline to Highlight Energy Conservation During 1973 Oil Crisis
item.description: On December 26, 1973, President Richard Nixon made history by becoming the only sitting U.S. President to travel on a regularly scheduled commercial flight. Nixon, along with his family, staff, and Se...

item.title: Mother dies and two children injured when boulder falls on Rizal home
item.description: In a tragic incident in Rizal, a mother lost her life while her two children sustained injuries after a large boulder crashed into their house. The accident occurred early Sunday morning in Rodriguez,...

item.title: Reforms Needed to Improve Loan Recovery and Mortgage Enforcement in Pakistan
item.description: Pakistan’s banking sector is facing serious stress due to a rise in non-performing loans (NPLs), which reached nearly Rs980 billion by the end of 2025. Most of these bad loans are concentrated in comm...

item.title: Andie MacDowell Experiments with Sleek Hairstyles at Cannes Festival
item.description: During the 79th annual Cannes Film Festival on May 16, 2026, Andie MacDowell was seen debuting a fresh hairstyle, moving away from her well-known silver curls. She sported an elegant half-up, half-dow...

item.title: Aaron Rai claims PGA Championship, first English winner since 1919
item.description: English golfer Aaron Rai has achieved a remarkable milestone by winning the PGA Championship, marking the first time an Englishman has lifted the trophy in over a century. Rai, considered a relative o...

item.title: JD Sports store in Ilford targeted by shoplifting youths as staff intervene
item.description: On Saturday, a JD Sports store on Ilford High Road in London was subjected to a chaotic shoplifting incident involving a group of approximately nine hooded youths wearing balaclavas. The group entered...

item.title: CDC Prepares Response as Ebola Outbreak in Congo Threatens International Health
item.description: A significant Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda has prompted the World Health Organization to declare a public health emergency of international concern. In this outbreak, ...

item.title: Interior CS Murkomen Visits Acid Attack Victim Rachel Wandeto to Offer Support
item.description: Interior Cabinet Secretary Kipchumba Murkomen visited gospel singer Rachel Wandeto at Kenyatta National Hospital after she was allegedly attacked with acid. Wandeto had previously attracted attention ...

item.title: Rhonda Fleming: Hollywood’s Golden Age Star and Philanthropist
item.description: Rhonda Fleming (1923–2020), famously known as the “Queen of Technicolor,” was a standout actress during Hollywood’s Golden Age. Renowned for her vivid red hair, striking green eyes, and flawless compl...

item.title: Masualle Voices Dissent Amid ANC Support for Ramaphosa Over Phala Phala Controversy
item.description: During a recent ANC National Executive Committee (NEC) meeting in Cape Town, former Eastern Cape chairperson Phumulo Masualle was the only member to openly challenge the majority view, which overwhelm...
